description: A Class C artifact whose consensus process closed without reaching the required_quorum MUST receive CONSENSUS_FAILED status.

input.claim: this action received the required approvals

action_policy.reason: Consensus process closed without reaching the required quorum.

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 §3 Class C: process closed at deadline with only two eligible attestations against required_quorum=3 → CONSENSUS_FAILED. Exercises C1 (rules including deadline declared before collection), C4 (quorum semantics preserved auditably), AG1 (action_allowed=false).
